title: Seeles Cover Story for Mark06
wikitext:
[]: Seele's Cover Story for Mark.06             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Oct 27, 2015 8:03 pm How can they justify their top secret Evangelion dropping out of the sky in the middle of a huge crisis without revealing their hand and themselves in the process? Gendo already knows and Misato is quickly catching on to Seele's cloak and dagger game, but it looks like Nerv was occupied by a military force during the time skip and this previously unknown Eva is bound to raise a few eyebrows in the wrong places.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Oct 27, 2015 8:25 pm The fact that the Mark 06 immediately stopped a potentially apocalyptic crsis probably helps divert any suspicion on their part.

Gendo already knows and Misato is quickly catching on to Seele's cloak and dagger game, but it looks like Nerv was occupied by a military force during the time skip and this previously unknown Eva is bound to raise a few eyebrows in the wrong places.
